title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Tama, Beast Pirates, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm? These are a special kind of Dango?

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Master Queen gave these to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They should help you heal faster.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorta feels better but I'm not sure... wait... I think it's working!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: I have enough for you gifters too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They also boost your physical strength!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wanna go to ONI- Gashima too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But no one will let me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hee hee! Leave it to me little master!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master, please stop! You're pushing yourself too hard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we have lots of Dango... we can get more to join our side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A Wano without Crochi or Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A Wano where Momo is Shogun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sick of always being hungry!! I should be allowed to have rice too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! sorry 'bout all that... I'm a changed man, so let's forget the past!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: You're all gonna serve our Master!! Gyahaha!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 49 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
